title: User Activity Reporting Feature Request
excerpt: Would be great to be able to manage our users better and be able to see or download a list of active users within our account, last date accessed monday.com as well as how often they log in, etc.  With the cost per licen…

posts.author: HarveyHeise (Harvey Heise)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to be able to manage our users better and be able to see or download a list of active users within our account, last date accessed monday.com as well as how often they log in, etc. With the cost per license that monday.com has, there should be a way for us to better manage our users, which would also help us with adoption rates within monday.com’s customers. So if we notice someone is not logging on, we can find out why and help tailor our adoption strategy with updates or changes. Not having this functionality is a hinderance to a greater use within our company as well as it will keep up from adopting the tool across our whole company.

posts.author: stephane.degaillande (Stéphane de GAILLANDE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Je plussoie car au-delà de l’adhésion à la solution, il peut être important de gérer les comptes inactifs pour des raisons évidentes de sécurité à l’accès aux données.
Dans le cas d’un utilisateur ayant quitté son entreprise, il est important de disposer de rappels sur les comptes inactifs afin d’intervenir par une désactivation/suppression.

L’automatisation d’envoie de rapport de la liste des comptes peut être un premier pas vers cette gestion d’identité.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there friends! We’ve developed Master Activity Logs, which acts as a ‘Master Activity Log’ for user activities in multiple boards. One of our widgets gives a glimpse into the last activity of each team member. It offers advanced reporting based on activity log data as well. Hopefully that helps out here!
